overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian city street during an orange-tinted sandstorm. The environment features heavy neon signage, digital billboards, scattered bodies, and the Delamain building, creating an atmosphere of urban decay and atmospheric immersion.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with wall-mounted vending machines during sandstorm

events.description: turns right at street corner passing the Homesick deli neon sign

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a building wall with vending machines, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the camera on the sidewalk before turning the corner

entered.detail: row of vending machines mounted on the building wall dispensing various products
tall modern street lamps illuminating the hazy orange atmosphere
red neon sign reading 'Homesick deli' on the building corner

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow sidewalk during an orange-hued sandstorm, with vending machines lining the right wall. The camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead and turns right at a corner marked by a 'Homesick deli' neon sign, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to a wider street.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital storefronts and wet reflective pavement

agents.ego_description: proceeding steadily down the commercial street observing the illuminated storefronts and advertisements

entered.detail: large bright pink neon sign reading 'SUPER SALE' on the building facade
multiple illuminated advertising screens displaying various products on building walls
trees planted in raised concrete planters along the street center
large vertical billboard displaying 'BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' advertisement with figure imagery

segments.scene_description: Walking down a wide commercial street bathed in neon light and orange haze, the scene features prominent pink 'SUPER SALE' signage and digital billboards lining both sides. The wet pavement reflects the neon glow, and the street is eerily empty of pedestrians as the camera approaches a large 'BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with advertising pillars and bodies scattered on the ground

events.description: discovers multiple bodies lying on the ground near illuminated advertising pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza observing the bodies and approaching the Delamain building

notable_agents.action: body lying face down on the pavement near an advertising display

entered.detail: tall rectangular advertising pillar with purple neon lighting and digital displays on all sides
multiple deceased individuals lying on the pavement throughout the plaza area
large industrial building with 'DELAMAIN' signage and circular ventilation fans

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a plaza filled with illuminated advertising pillars and scattered bodies on the wet pavement. The camera moves past purple-lit advertising structures toward the Delamain building, which features prominent industrial ventilation fans and corporate signage, while navigating around the deceased figures lying on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: Delamain facility entrance with large industrial ventilation systems

events.description: approaches the Delamain building entrance passing a large billboard advertisement

agents.ego_description: approaching the Delamain facility entrance while observing a person crouching near a body

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing crouching over a body then standing up

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' advertisement with muscular figure
large circular industrial fans mounted on the Delamain building facade
automated entrance doors to the Delamain facility with illuminated signage above

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the Delamain building entrance, dominated by large industrial ventilation fans and a massive 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' billboard on the left. The camera moves toward the facility doors, passing a person in white clothing crouching near a body, with the environment becoming more sheltered and industrial in appearance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian city street that transforms from a narrow, enclosed sidewalk into a wide, industrial plaza during an orange-hued sandstorm. It begins by following a pedestrian past vending machines before turning right at a neon Homesick deli sign to emerge onto a broad commercial thoroughfare. As the camera advances, the environment opens up into a neon-bathed corridor of pink sale signs and digital billboards reflecting off wet pavement, eventually shifting into a desolate plaza scattered with bodies and illuminated advertising pillars. The scene then moves past purple-lit structures toward the Delamain building, where the atmosphere becomes increasingly industrial. Finally, the camera approaches the facility entrance, passing a crouching figure in white and a massive billboard before arriving at the building's large ventilation fans.
